name: Electronic density of states
conventions: normalisation: integral from -infinity to epsilon_F of g(epsilon) d epsilon = N_electrons / V
expectedLimits: finite at insulator/semiconductor gap edges, zero inside the gap
smooth under k-mesh refinement (Methfessel-Paxton or Gaussian smearing)
references: Ashcroft & Mermin, Solid State Physics, ch.8
Martin, Electronic Structure: Basic Theory and Practical Methods, ch.3
